creator: flo@kasimir.com
text:
netstat -i -b grew an additional column Idrop, this caused the scripts to use wrong columns when Idrop was
in the output. fix this by adding a new check in the 2 scripts which call netstat

I ignored the portlint and port test warnings as I only wanted to fix this issue and not mess with the rest
of the port, as it seems to be working fine.

Added file(s):
- files/patch-node-node.d.freebsd-if_.in.diff
- files/patch-node-node.d.freebsd-if_errcoll_.in.diff

Port maintainer (des@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99
